summary: ISS-828 confirmed: the section misclassifies which WINs explicitly invoke aetheric refraction. Corrected: WIN-065 moved from explicit to implicit (dome attributes to firmament curvature H(r), not n(r)), WIN-033 moved from implicit to explicit (dome explicitly cites aetheric medium depth/attenuation), WIN-069 added as new explicit (dome cites aetheric refraction for Australian distances). Total affected WINs: 7 (up from 6). Parallax factor corrected from 10^12 to ~5e11. n(r) formula verified still active on dome site 2026-04-13. Three replacement HTML blocks provided: the Which WINs paragraph, the Core Problem paragraph (parallax fix), and the Conclusion paragraph. TLDR unchanged — thrust is the same.
